creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Thomas Zander from comment #18)
> As Konstantin has suggested in the mail thread on multimedia, could you add
> -mstackrealign to the compiler flags and check if this fixes the crashing?

Probably "-mstack-alignment=16 -mstackrealign" for Clang on i386 like multimedia/gstreamer1-libav does.
